name: source-intake
summary: Register sources with access, provenance, and redistribution boundaries.

name: provision-compiler
summary: Compile source text into clause-level provisions with locators.

name: regulatory-answer
summary: Answer standards and regulatory questions with citations and version safety.

name: change-impact
summary: Analyze source or version changes and produce impact packets.

name: compliance-checklist
summary: Map provisions to controls, evidence, owners, and review status.
